productDisplayName: Nike Men's Air Force Red Shoe
description: Replete with a low-cut silhouette and a versatile look, the nike Air Force 1 '07 has been crafted on the lines of the iconic AF1, blending classic style, innovative technology and fresh detailing in a Basketball shoe. With an extra pair of laces to give you a new look every time, and exceeding all standards of performance, functionality and excellence, the nike Air Force 1 '07 has been a celebrated sneaker for over 25 years now. Upper Synthetic leather upper with crisp edges for maximum durability and a cleaner look Perforated toe box and sides for ample ventilation Low cut silhouette for a low-to-ground feel Cotton twill lace-up system with lightly padded tongue for snug Fit Metal tag on lace to honour the shoe Mildly cushioned sockliner for in-step comfort  Midsole Phylon midsole with an encapsulated Nike Air unit for lightweight cushioning and shock absorption Massive midsole for soft, springy cushioning  Outsole Non-marking rubber outsole for better traction and durability Pivot points on the big toe mound and heel, coupled with circular lugs for smooth transition in all directions  Shoe care Do not machine wash Remove dust and dirt with dry clean cloth
